description: Emails internes riches envoyés aux admins plateforme pour 4 événements : inscription, abonnement créé/modifié, abonnement annulé, trial expiré. Inclut MRR/ARR individuel + plateforme.

userStories.title: Admin notification service core + MRR helper + HTML builder
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want a core service that can send rich HTML emails with MRR/ARR calculations so that all 4 event types share common infrastructure.
acceptanceCriteria: admin-notification.service.ts exists with 4 public methods (notifyNewSignup, notifySubscriptionChange, notifySubscriptionCancelled, notifyTrialExpired)
admin-mrr.helper.ts calculates individual MRR from lots+priceId and platform MRR from all active subscriptions
admin-email-builder.ts generates inline HTML with colored badge, data table, responsive layout
getAdminRecipients() parses ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_EMAILS env var (comma-separated, works with 1 or N)
Graceful degradation: no error if env var is empty
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: 3 files created: admin-notification.service.ts (4 public methods + factory), admin-mrr.helper.ts (individual + platform MRR, formatEur, getPlanLabel), admin-email-builder.ts (inline HTML with colored badges per event type). Uses Resend directly for raw HTML (no React Email templates). Graceful: empty env var = early return.

userStories.title: Integrate admin notification into signup flows (OAuth + Email)
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want to receive an email when a new user signs up, whether via Google OAuth or email confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: OAuth flow: completeOAuthProfileAction calls notifyNewSignup after successful profile creation (fire-and-forget)
Email flow: API route /api/internal/admin-signup-notification sends notification for email-confirmed users
set-password page calls the API route after successful password set
Email contains: name, email, method, date, total platform users count
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: OAuth: dynamic import in completeOAuthProfileAction (fire-and-forget). Email: API route /api/internal/admin-signup-notification with auth + 1-hour guard. set-password page calls fetch fire-and-forget after password set success.

userStories.title: Integrate admin notification into Stripe webhooks (created/updated/deleted)
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want to receive emails with MRR/ARR impact when subscriptions are created, lots change, or subscriptions are cancelled.
acceptanceCriteria: handleSubscriptionCreated sends notifySubscriptionChange with lots and priceId
handleSubscriptionUpdated sends notifySubscriptionChange only when subscribed_lots actually changes (compare old vs new)
handleSubscriptionDeleted sends notifySubscriptionCancelled with lost lots and MRR impact
Subject lines include MRR delta and color-coded emoji (blue upgrade, orange downgrade, red churn)
Email includes individual + platform MRR/ARR
All notifications are non-blocking (try/catch, no webhook failure)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Added getTeamAdminDetails + sendSubscriptionAdminNotification helpers to StripeWebhookHandler. Created: fire-and-forget after upsert (oldLots=0). Updated: fetches old lots before upsert, only notifies if quantity changed. Deleted: captures lotsLost/priceId/startDate before transition, sends churn notification.

userStories.title: Integrate admin notification into trial expiration cron
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want to receive an email when a user's trial expires, with their activity metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: trial-expiration cron calls notifyTrialExpired after each status transition
Email contains: name, email, team, new status, lot count, usage duration, intervention count
Notification is fire-and-forget (does not block cron processing)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Added import + admin notification after user email in cron loop. Expanded team_members select to include last_name/name. Intervention count via count-only query (head: true). Fire-and-forget with try/catch.

userStories.title: Environment variable setup + integration smoke check
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the env var documented and the service properly exported so it's easy to configure.
acceptanceCriteria: ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_EMAILS added to .env.example with comment
Service exported via lib/services index if applicable
npm run lint passes on all changed files
userStories.notes: Added ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_EMAILS to .env.example with comment. Service uses direct import + factory pattern (same as subscription-email.service). No index export needed.
